MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Don H. Schafer, Esq., Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP, 925-222-3400, counsel for Defendant and moving to be relieved;
No other appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court makes the following ruling:

Don H. Schafer, Esq, counsel for DEFENDANT RESHO CORPORATION, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. Counsel being relieved is to prepare and submit form of order using the approved Mandatory Judicial Council form to be Relieved as Counsel by email to Contestdept302tr.sftc.org.
